text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory finishes her training regimen
with more energy than usual today.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Phew! That's all for today... Buuut!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I think I can keep going! Is it okay if I do a bit
more?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! I'm feeling extra motivated!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Remember how I ran in that scrimmage
for that special news report the other day?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Turns out my dad was watching. He called me
after and had nothing but good things to say!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
What impressed me the most? Hm... I was
impressed you never lost sight of yourself, even
though you were up against all those fast runners.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Racing is a lot like kendo—during a match, our
hearts tend to waver. Therefore, whoever wins the
mental battle wins the match. In the past, your
heart also wavered.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
But all I saw in that report was you having a good
time racing against tough opponents and giving it
your all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
It looked like your heart was clear as day! That's a
real mark of strength! ...You've grown so much,
Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...And you know what I told him? I said the reason
I've got such a strong heart is...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the support of my passionate trainer!
We're the best duo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Saying passionate stuff like that really gets
me fired up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All righty! I'm going for another round of training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She called us the best duo... I hope I can continue
to guide her with enough passion that she always
feels this way.
